# Consensus Engine — FastAPI Server

> Multi-Agent Medical Consensus API cho AI Clinic  
> Fuses predictions từ các specialist AI agents thành một chẩn đoán hội đồng duy nhất.

---

## Vision — System Architecture

![Medical Digital Twin & Multi-Agent Consensus Architecture](data:image/png;base64,)

> **Stack từ trên xuống:** Frontend Super App (Next.js · OpenHuman · MiroFish) → Gateway API (FastAPI · Redis · Kafka) → Medical AI Agents Swarm (Radiology · Diabetes · ECG · Oncology · Lab) → Consensus Engine (Bayesian · Majority · Weighted · Graph) → Doctor Review (SHAP · Audit · Override)

---

## Cấu trúc project

```
consensus_engine/
├── app/
│   ├── main.py                  # FastAPI app, CORS, middleware, health check
│   ├── routes/
│   │   └── consensus.py         # 3 endpoints: /consensus, /compare, /methods
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── consensus_service.py # Orchestrator: gọi fusion, tính risk, flag review
│   ├── models/
│   │   └── schemas.py           # Pydantic request/response models
│   ├── ai/
│   │   └── bayesian_fusion.py   # 4 thuật toán: Bayesian, Weighted, Majority, Graph
│   └── tests/
│       └── test_consensus.py    # 21 pytest cases
├── Dockerfile
├── requirements.txt
└── USAGE.sh
```

---

## Cài đặt & chạy

```bash
cd consensus_engine
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn app.main:app --reload

# → http://127.0.0.1:8000
# → http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs   (Swagger UI)
# → http://127.0.0.1:8000/redoc  (ReDoc)
```

---

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Mô tả |
|--------|------|-------|
| `POST` | `/api/v1/consensus` | Chạy một fusion method |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/consensus/compare` | Chạy cả 4 methods, trả về so sánh |
| `GET`  | `/api/v1/consensus/methods` | Liệt kê methods có sẵn |
| `GET`  | `/health` | Health check |

---

## 4 thuật toán Fusion

### 1. Bayesian (mặc định)
Chuyển confidence thành **log-odds**, nhân với **specialty prior weight**, sigmoid ngược lại.

```
log_odds_i = log(confidence_i / (1 - confidence_i))
weight_i   = log(specialty_prior_i / (1 - specialty_prior_i))
final      = sigmoid( Σ(log_odds_i × weight_i) / Σ(weight_i) )
```

| Specialty | Prior |
|-----------|-------|
| lab | 0.93 |
| diabetes | 0.91 |
| pathology | 0.89 |
| radiology | 0.88 |
| oncology | 0.86 |
| ecg | 0.84 |

### 2. Weighted
Weighted average: `confidence × specialty_prior`, normalize. Nhanh hơn Bayesian, phù hợp real-time.

### 3. Majority Vote
Agents bỏ phiếu. Cần đạt **quorum** (mặc định 60%). Tie-breaking bằng tổng confidence.

### 4. Graph Propagation
Message-passing trên **specialty adjacency graph**. Lab ↔ Diabetes ↔ Cardiology reinforce nhau qua 2 iterations.

---

## Request / Response

```json
POST /api/v1/consensus
{
  "patient_id": "PAT-2024-00042",
  "session_id": "SESS-001",
  "method": "bayesian",
  "run_all": false,
  "predictions": [
    { "agent_id": "radiology-v2",    "specialty": "radiology", "diagnosis": "Type 2 Diabetes — retinopathy",   "confidence": 0.87, "icd10_code": "E11.3"  },
    { "agent_id": "diabetes-xgb-v3", "specialty": "diabetes",  "diagnosis": "Type 2 Diabetes — metabolic",    "confidence": 0.91, "icd10_code": "E11.9"  },
    { "agent_id": "ecg-cnn-v1",      "specialty": "ecg",       "diagnosis": "Sinus tachycardia",              "confidence": 0.79, "icd10_code": "R00.0"  },
    { "agent_id": "lab-gbm-v2",      "specialty": "lab",       "diagnosis": "HbA1c 7.2% — confirmed",        "confidence": 0.94, "icd10_code": "R73.09" }
  ]
}
```

```json
{
  "patient_id": "PAT-2024-00042",
  "risk_level": "high",
  "requires_doctor_review": false,
  "result": {
    "method": "bayesian",
    "fused_confidence": 0.8964,
    "agreement_score": 0.9437,
    "dominant_agent": "lab-gbm-v2",
    "diagnosis": "Type 2 Diabetes — metabolic syndrome",
    "recommendation": "High confidence — recommend immediate clinical action. Lead: lab (94%).",
    "num_agents": 4,
    "agent_weights": [
      { "agent_id": "radiology-v2", "specialty": "radiology", "confidence": 0.87, "weight": 2.0001, "contribution": 1.74 }
    ]
  }
}
```

---

## Risk levels

| Level | Điều kiện | Ý nghĩa |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| `low` | confidence < 55% | Cần thêm xét nghiệm |
| `moderate` | 55–75% | Review đa chuyên khoa |
| `high` | 75–90% | Xác nhận thêm |
| `critical` | ≥ 90% | Hành động lâm sàng ngay |

`requires_doctor_review: true` khi `fused_confidence < 0.70` **hoặc** `agreement_score < 0.65`.

---

## Test

```bash
pytest app/tests/ -v
# 21 tests: math helpers · 4 fusion algorithms · API endpoints
```

---

## Docker

```bash
docker build -t consensus-engine .
docker run -p 8000:8000 consensus-engine
```

```yaml
services:
  backend:
    build: ./consensus_engine
    ports: ["8000:8000"]
  frontend:
    build: ./ai-doctor-admin
    ports: ["5173:5173"]
    environment:
      - VITE_CONSENSUS_API_URL=http://backend:8000
```

---

## Thêm specialty mới

```python
SPECIALTY_PRIORS["neurology"] = 0.82
SPECIALTY_GRAPH["neurology"]  = ["radiology", "pathology"]
```

Gửi request với `"specialty": "neurology"` — không cần đổi schema.
